'''Vol Noorr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yevetha]]n who served as the [[Primate (Yevethan rank)|Primate]] of the ''[[Purity]]''. When the ''[[Astrolabe]]'' was spotted making a reconnaissance run within the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], he ordered his gunners to fire on the vessel. After the ''Astrolabe'' was destroyed, he sent an encoded message to [[Nil Spaar]] detailing the attack.
